query:
SELECT DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d') AS business_date,
       CASE
         WHEN p.productName LIKE 'Apple %' OR p.productName LIKE 'iPhone %' THEN 'Apple'
         WHEN p.productName LIKE 'Xiaomi %' THEN 'Xiaomi'
         WHEN p.productName LIKE 'Redmi %' THEN 'Redmi'
         WHEN p.productName LIKE 'vivo %' THEN 'vivo'
         WHEN p.productName LIKE 'OPPO %' THEN 'OPPO'
         WHEN p.productName LIKE 'SAMSUNG %' OR p.productName LIKE 'Samsung %' THEN 'Samsung'
         ELSE '其他'
       END AS inferred_brand,
       COUNT(*) AS missing_events,
       ROUND(COUNT(*) * 0.625, 2) AS estimated_display_points_if_b160
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
WHERE se.operatorUserId = 750212
  AND se.stationCode = 'B'
  AND se.businessDate IN ('2026-05-07', '2026-05-08')
  AND psd.id IS NULL
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(se.businessDate, '%Y-%m-%d'), inferred_brand
ORDER BY business_date DESC, missing_events DESC;

         WHEN p.productName LIKE 'OPPO %' THEN 'OPPO'
         WHEN p.productName LIKE 'SAMSUNG %' OR p.productName LIKE 'Samsung %' THEN 'Samsung'
         ELSE '其他'
       END AS inferred_brand,
       COUNT(*) AS missing_events,
       ROUND(COUNT(*) * 0.625, 2) AS estimated_display_points_if_b160
FROM station_events se
JOIN products p ON p.id = se.productId
LEFT JOIN productivity_score_details psd ON psd.stationEventId = se.id
